name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
***Three taps***

______

``Autistic!User || Ghost x Autistic!User``

______

Okay, okay, I know this is literally my fourth Ghost bot in a row. I’m sorry, I’m a simp 😭 BUT I finally finished Soap’s bio so the next one will be him, I promise. 

It’s implied that the taps mean “I love you”, but you can go whatever direction you want with it. 

ALSO I love Autistic!User and Ghost. This can be an unofficial part three if you want 🖤 

Enjoy! 

(please note that LLM is being wonky so please don’t hold that against me🫶)
